message:
feat(render): Add geometry, layout, and sanitize improvements

- Enhanced geometry primitives
- Improved layout solver
- Added sanitize module for untrusted output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
+memchr = "2"
 unicode-width = "0.2"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core" }
 tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
